NRJI
Cannes Lions 2026
22–26 June · Côte d'Azur
Energy is your edge · Partnership invitation

Extraordinary ideas demand extraordinary capacity. NRJI trains it.

A first-of-its-kind performance category: Energy Training. The workout is the vehicle. Identity change is the destination.

Morning
Power Session
Afternoon
Reset Session
The category

A new
performance
category.

NRJI builds the capacity to perform when it matters most. Grounded in neuroscience, performance psychology and longevity research, it treats energy as a trainable resource — not a mood, not a given.

The workout is the vehicle. Identity change is the destination. Attendees do not just move differently. They leave with embodied evidence that they are capable of more.

01

Pressure

Meet the moment the body recognises as load — and stay in it.

02

Courage

Move toward the edge instead of away from it.

03

Self-trust

Prove to yourself, in real time, that you can.

04

Identity shift

Walk out as someone with new evidence of who they are.

The Cannes launch

Two sessions a day.
One four-stage arc.

Two 20-minute sessions daily — a Morning Power Session and an Afternoon Reset — each built around NRJI's arc that moves attendees from pressure to identity shift.

02

On the ground

The sessions

Twice daily across the festival, plus a live conversation on energy, courage and the self-trust behind extraordinary creativity.

Content & reach

Daily reels

Daily Reels across three Instagram accounts, all partners tagged. Collab Reels available for brands who want to co-create content on the ground.

The ask

What we want

Event spaces. Brand collaborators. Access to attendees. Full details follow in the email.

The mission behind the moment
£100
No backing. No budget.
Under three weeks.

That is not the backstory. That is the demonstration.

NRJI is arriving at Cannes organised entirely through community, energy and determination. At a time when a generation of young adults is locked out of opportunity, NRJI exists to prove the most powerful resource is not money or status. It is the capacity to act anyway.

Every door opened, every session run, every reel shared is proof of what becomes possible when you train that capacity. If that story resonates with your brand, we would like to tell it together.

Founding member voices

Felt, not claimed.

"I've never done anything like this. I think it's going to be the next really big thing."

Giorgia

"I came in nervous. I left feeling like I could do anything."

Holly

"I feel relaxed and energised at the same time. Never felt like that after a workout before."

Geanine

"I feel unstoppable."

Clare
Sophie Storm Roberts Founder, NRJI
The founder

Trained, not born.

Sophie Storm Roberts became a world-first endurance athlete from no athletic background — by learning to stay present, courageous and curious under extreme pressure.

Founder of L2P24, helping 1,000+ people cycle London to Paris in 24 hours, and TrailBlazers, building confidence and courage in teenage girls. Coach to founders, leaders and athletes.

NRJI is the culmination of two decades proving extraordinary performance is not reserved for the elite. It can be trained.

TEDx Speaker Harvard Speaker Adventure Athlete
The invitation

Be part of bringing it to Cannes.

NRJI is opening conversations with a small number of partners who believe in what we are building. Sophie will be in touch with suggested times to connect.
